name: Dimension Lord Vader

sheet.name: Dimension Lord Vader
sheet.background_story: Traveled Through multiple dimensions. Learned the ways of many. Much is not known about me. I myself have lost sight of who I truly once was originally. I've been to this dimension before...Do I have lovers? Children? What relationships were created if any? I must overcome this dimensions like many others and seek out my past here.
